name: ModelDB 189347 DSGC Port
short_description: Python-driven port of ModelDB 189347 (Poleg-Polsky & Diamond 2016 ON-OFF DRD4 DSGC) with a NEURON/HOC back-end, 12-angle drifting-bar tuning-curve runner, and t0012-based envelope scoring.

entry_points.name: build_dsgc
entry_points.description: Load the compiled nrnmech.dll, source RGCmodel.hoc and the GUI-free dsgc_model.hoc, and return a fully-initialised NEURON h-handle with RGC.numsyn point processes placed on ON dendrites.

entry_points.name: run_one_trial
entry_points.description: Apply per-trial seed and angle, rotate BIP synapse coords, rerun placeBIP(), finitialize and continuerun to tstop, and return the soma firing rate in Hz.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.description: Sweep 12 angles x 20 trials on the bundled DSGC and emit a canonical-schema tuning curve CSV consumable by tuning_curve_loss.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.description: Score the emitted tuning curve against the t0004 target via tuning_curve_loss and write results/metrics.json plus data/score_report.json.

entry_points.name: main
entry_points.description: Compare the bundled Poleg-Polsky morphology with the calibrated t0009 SWC and write data/morphology_swap_report.md.
